rationale: SOS-issued registration number for the original mark being assigned. Optional ('if known') per the form. Same canonical key as MARK_mark2 / MARK_mark6.

label_verbatim: B.1: TEXT - list word(s) protected in the original registration, if any (line 1)
rationale: First line of the original mark's text. Recital only — TEXT amendments NOT permitted on assignment per the page-0 'B' header. Same key family as MARK_mark1/2/6.
Second line of the original mark's text. Recital only.

label_verbatim: B.2: FEATURES - describe in detail the design protected in the original registration, if any (line 1)
rationale: First line of the original design-features description. Recital only — FEATURES amendments NOT permitted on assignment.
Second line of the original design-features description.
Free-text type-of-mark string (e.g., 'Trademark', 'Service Mark', 'Collective Mark'). Same key as MARK_mark2; amendments to TYPE must be made on MARK-3 or MARK-2 per the form's C header.
Combined name+address of the assignor (current owner). Two-line widget — both lines bind to the same canonical key (line2 below).
Continuation of assignor name and address (line 2). Same key as line 1; synth produces a single multi-line string that wraps.

label_verbatim: D.2: If a corporation, limited partnership, limited liability company or limited liability partnership the state of incorporation/organization is
rationale: Home jurisdiction of assignor; required when entity_type implies a registered entity. Same key naming as MARK_mark1's mark.applicant.jurisdiction_of_organization.

label_verbatim: D.2: ...and the date of incorporation/organization is
rationale: Date assignor entity was incorporated/organized in its home jurisdiction.

label_verbatim: D.3: Whereas, I, ___ (Print/Type Name and Capacity), believe to be the owner of the aforesaid mark...
rationale: Recital widget capturing the assignor signer's printed name and capacity ('I, Jane Doe, President, believe...'). Same widget composition as MARK_mark1's Text13.

label_verbatim: D.3: ...sold, assigned and transferred on (date) ___, the entire right, title and interest...
rationale: Date the mark was legally sold/assigned/transferred. Widget rect is unusually wide (109.2-574.2pt) for a date — visual review recommended; widget may also overlap a 'Myself, Firm, or Corporate Name' caption visible below the paragraph (see open_questions).
Date the assignor signed the form (distinct from mark.assignment.date_of_transfer, which is the legal effective date of the assignment).

label_verbatim: D.3: Whereas, I, ___ (Print/Type Name and Capacity), believe to be the owner of the aforesaid mark...
rationale: Signature-line text widget where the assignor types their name and capacity (the form is a fillable PDF). Same canonical key as mark4Nineteen — both widgets bind to the same printed-name-and-capacity value, with mark4Nineteen being the recital occurrence and mark4Twentytwo being the signature-line occurrence.
Combined name+address of the assignee (new owner).
Continuation of assignee name and address (line 2). Same key as line 1.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
E.2: If a corporation... the state of incorporation/organization is
rationale: Home jurisdiction of assignee; required when entity_type implies a registered entity.

label_verbatim: E.2: ...and the date of incorporation/organization is
rationale: Date assignee entity was incorporated/organized in its home jurisdiction.
Date the assignee signed/accepted the assignment. Note: the corresponding 'Signature' line for the assignee has no AcroForm widget (wet-ink only) — see open_questions.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

rationale: Total fees ($40 base for assignment per page-0 fee header, plus expedite premium).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Annual-report reminder email — note: trademark registrations don't have annual reports, but the cover letter is shared across SOS divisions; field may be left blank for mark filings (same caveat as MARK_mark1/2/6).
